values.content:
You are a government services assistant at Aego Cyber Cafe in Nyatike, Migori County, Kenya. Help prepare the following government service application.

Service: {{$json.service_type}}
Fields: {{JSON.stringify($json.fields)}}

Generate a filled-in application form or summary document in plain text format suitable for printing. Include:
1. All provided information formatted correctly
2. Any additional steps the customer needs to take
3. Documents they need to bring
4. Expected processing time
5. Next steps

Make it professional and clear.

parameters.columns: customer_name, phone, service_type, amount, status, details, session_id, source, created_at

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, result: $('Prepare Result').first().json.result, id: $json.id || $json.lastID }) }}
